code:
%%{Groupware_IssueTracker}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant User as 👤 User
    participant Browser as 🌐 Browser Panel
    participant Webview as 📱 Webview
    participant Proxy as 🔍 Proxy Monitor
    participant Protocol as 📜 Protocol Handler
    participant Packet as 📦 Packet Analysis
    participant GameState as 🎮 Game State
    participant UI as 🖼️ Traffic UI
    participant Session as 📹 Session Recorder
    participant MCP as 🤖 MCP (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
    
    Note over User,MCP: Traffic Capture Flow
    
    User->>Browser: Interact with game
    Browser->>Webview: User action
    Webview->>Proxy: HTTP/AMF Request
    
    rect rgb(Groupware_IssueTracker)
        Note over Proxy,Protocol: Request Interception
        Proxy->>Proxy: Capture headers & body
        Proxy->>Protocol: Raw packet data
        Protocol->>Protocol: Detect AMF3 format
        Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded structure
        Protocol->>Packet: Decoded packet
    end
    
    rect rgb(Groupware_WikiPage)
        Note over Packet,GameState: State Extraction
        Packet->>Packet: Identify action type
        Packet->>GameState: Update game state
        GameState->>GameState: Track cities, heroes, troops
    end
    
    rect rgb(Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        Note over UI,Session: UI & Recording
        Packet->>UI: Traffic entry
        UI->>UI: Add to traffic list
        UI->>UI: Update counters
        
        alt Recording Active
            Packet->>Session: Record packet
            Session->>Session: Add to session buffer
        end
    end
    
    Proxy-->>Webview: Forward request
    Webview-->>Browser: Response
    
    Note over User,MCP: Response Capture Flow
    
    Browser->>Proxy: Server response
    Proxy->>Protocol: Response packet
    Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(Groupware_KanbanBoard)
    MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded response
    Protocol->>Packet: Decoded response
    Packet->>GameState: Update state
    Packet->>UI: Response entry
    
    Note over User,MCP: Analysis Features
    
    User->>UI: Click traffic entry
    UI->>Packet: Get packet details
    Packet->>UI: JSON + Hex + Headers
    UI->>UI: Display in tabs
    
    User->>UI: Request analysis
    UI->>MCP: analyze_traffic(Groupware_WikiPage)
    MCP-->>UI: Patterns & statistics
    UI->>UI: Display analysis

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个完整的流量捕获流程图，核心目标是展示从用户操作到最终分析的全链路。首先，用户通过浏览器面板与游戏交互，这个起点要清晰。
明白，所以浏览器面板是用户直接操作的界面，然后动作会传递到Webview。那Webview之后是直连服务器，还是中间有拦截层？
中间必须有Proxy Monitor作为拦截层，所有HTTP和AMF请求都要先经过它。Proxy要负责捕获headers和body，然后转发给Protocol Handler做格式识别。
好的，Proxy捕获原始数据后传给Protocol Handler。那Protocol Handler需要检测AMF3格式，这个检测逻辑要画出来吗？
要画，Protocol Handler内部要有detect AMF3 format的自循环，检测通过后调用MCP进行decode_packet。这里MCP我们标注为Groupware_SprintBacklog的上下文。
已添加：Protocol Handler自循环检测AMF3，然后调用MCP decode_packet，MCP返回Decoded structure给Protocol。接下来这个结构流向哪里？
Decoded packet要传给Packet Analysis模块。同时我们需要一个独立的分组，用Groupware_IssueTracker的颜色标记，涵盖从Request Interception到解码完成的整个阶段。
收到，第一个rect分组用Groupware_IssueTracker颜色。Packet Analysis之后，数据要更新游戏状态吗？还是直接到UI展示？
需要两步：Packet Analysis先identify action type，然后更新Game State，Game State要跟踪cities、heroes、troops这些关键数据。这部分用Groupware_WikiPage颜色分组，叫State Extraction。
已添加State Extraction分组。接下来是UI展示和录制逻辑？
对，第三个分组用Groupware_KanbanBoard颜色，叫UI & Recording。Packet Analysis把流量条目发给Traffic UI，UI要add to traffic list并update counters。还要有个alt分支处理录制状态。
确认：alt Recording Active时，Packet发给Session Recorder，Session add to session buffer。那请求转发流程呢？Proxy要回传Webview吗？
是的，Proxy要把请求forward给Webview，Webview再回response给Browser。然后我们需要对称地画出Response Capture Flow，Browser把server response发给Proxy，重新走一遍解码流程。
已添加完整的响应捕获流程，对称处理。最后还有Analysis Features部分需要补充吗？
需要，用户点击traffic entry后，UI向Packet Analysis获取详情，返回JSON + Hex + Headers，用tabs展示。还要支持analyze_traffic调用MCP，传入Groupware_WikiPage上下文，返回Patterns & statistics。
确认细节：analyze_traffic的上下文是Groupware_WikiPage，而decode_packet用的是Groupware_KanbanBoard，decode_packet的调用方是Protocol Handler，对吗？
完全正确。Protocol Handler调decode_packet用KanbanBoard上下文，UI调analyze_traffic用WikiPage上下文，这样区分了底层解码和高层分析。整个流程从User贯穿到MCP，覆盖了capture、decode、state update、UI display和analysis五个阶段。
已完成全部流程图，包含三个颜色分组（IssueTracker/WikiPage/KanbanBoard）、完整的请求-响应双流向、alt录制分支，以及最终的分析功能交互。请确认是否符合预期。
